understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile (+). Each level had a limited step budget, and victory required all goals to be occupied simultaneously.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN to shift the currently selected piece by the grid cell size (3 pixels). Adjacent pushable blocks (B) could be pushed along. Walls (#) blocked movement. Switching control to another selectable piece required CLICK with its exact pixel coordinates. Movement hints like `_blocked` were heuristic and not always definitive.
